claim: Observability and logging are critical for production agents—track all tool calls, model outputs, and decision points
actionable: Implement structured logging for every tool invocation and decision in your agent, with timestamps and context for debugging
source_title: Must Haves For Agents in Production

claim: Rate limiting and cost controls are mandatory in production agents to prevent runaway API spending
actionable: Set hard limits on tool calls per run, tokens per step, and daily spend; implement circuit breakers when limits approach
source_title: Must Haves For Agents in Production

claim: Agent timeout policies prevent tasks from hanging indefinitely in production
actionable: Set explicit max_time_per_step and overall_max_time for agent runs, with graceful fallback when timeouts occur
source_title: Must Haves For Agents in Production

claim: Reproducibility in agents requires capturing all inputs (prompts, tool state, model parameters) to enable post-run analysis
actionable: Store agent run metadata (timestamp, inputs, outputs, tool results) in a structured format for audit and debugging
source_title: Must Haves For Agents in Production
